offer: For law firms processing 5–15 case filings/month, delays in document submission cause missed deadlines. We automate document submission instead of manual submission of documents.
problem: delays in document submission for legal case filings
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firms seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about legal workflows
Direct message outreach to law firms with demo video
Join community forums where law firms share resources
try_it: Let users try recurring schedule setup and notification system for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing case data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process for new users
